notices.title: Welcome to Academic Year 2026
notices.message:
Dear Parents and Students,

We are delighted to welcome you all to the new academic year 2026 at Navrachna International School. Classes will commence from April 1st, 2026. Please ensure all students report in proper uniform with necessary stationery.

Warm Regards,
Administration

notices.title: Parent-Teacher Meeting — August 2026
notices.message:
Dear Parents,

A Parent-Teacher Meeting is scheduled for Saturday, August 8th, 2026 from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM. You are requested to attend the meeting to discuss your child's academic progress.

Please carry the student's report card and diary.

Regards,
Academic Affairs

notices.title: Unit Test 1 Schedule Released
notices.message:
Dear Students,

The schedule for Unit Test 1 (July 15-22, 2026) has been uploaded to the school calendar. Please check the calendar module for date-wise subject schedule. Portions have been shared with class teachers.

All the best!

Academic Affairs

notices.title: Annual Sports Day Announcement
notices.message:
Dear Students and Teachers,

The Annual Sports Day will be held on December 12th, 2026. Inter-house selections will begin from November 15th. Students interested in athletics should register with their PE teacher Mr. Arjun Malhotra.

Sports Department

notices.title: Class 10 Board Exam Guidelines
notices.message:
Dear Class 10 Students and Parents,

Please note:
1. Admit cards will be distributed by February 1st
2. Students must carry valid ID proof
3. Mobile phones are strictly prohibited
4. Report 30 minutes before exam time

Academic Affairs

notices.title: Fee Payment Reminder — Term 2
notices.message:
Dear Parents,

This is a gentle reminder that the fee for Term 2 (October - March) is due by September 30th, 2026. Late payments will attract a fine of Rs. 50/day.

Payment modes: Online, Bank Transfer, or Cash at school office.

Accounts Department
